reference: Hi, I fell going up the stairs on Sunday. My knee has been swollen for four days now and bruised. It hurts when I apply pressure to the ball of my foot and when I have to put pressure on the actual knee. That didn’t really concern me, but my knee has been numb for about four days now. When I am walking, it feels like my knee is bleeding when it isn’t, and certain bending feels like when you have a scab and you tear it. I know this is jumbled, but I need advice because it is sore and I don’t know what else to do. My name is Katelyn, and I am twenty-one years old.
text: Hi, I fell going up the stairs on Sunday. My knee has been swollen for 4 days now, and bruised. It hurts when I apply pressure to the ball of my foot, and when I have to put pressure on the actual knee. That didn't really concern me, but my knee has been numb for about 4 days now. When I'm walking, it feels like my knee is bleeding when it isn't, and certain bending feels like when you have a scab and you tear it. I know this is jumbled, but I need advice because it is sore and I don't know what else to do. My name is Caitlin, and I am 21 years old.
